testCoverage: 5 WireMock integration tests covering: successful search with response mapping, URL deduplication (case-insensitive), multi-query merge, empty results, and API error handling. All required scenarios covered.
summary: Clean implementation following SearchPort interface. Dedicated RestTemplate with configurable timeouts. Correct Bearer auth, case-insensitive URL deduplication with distinctBy, maxTotalResults enforcement. WireMock tests validate all request/response behaviors.
